subject: Fix portal URL generation in share-url.js, portal-links.js, and autoProposal.js
description:
Change all portal URL generation to use CLIENT_PORTAL_URL env var instead of in-app URLs.

Files to change:
1. `api/quotes/[id]/share-url.js` - Replace `getPortalBase()` to return external portal URL. Remove `ensureQuotePath()` logic. Use `process.env.CLIENT_PORTAL_URL || 'https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com'`. URL format: `{portalBase}/{quoteId}` (no `/quote/` prefix).
2. `api/quotes/[id]/portal-links.js` - Same change as share-url.js for consistency.
3. `api/lib/autoProposal.js` - Change `getPortalQuoteBase()` to use `CLIENT_PORTAL_URL` env var. Remove the `/quote` suffix appending. URL format: `{portalBase}/{quoteId}`.
4. `api/quotes/index.js` (line 397-399) - Change URL generation to use `CLIENT_PORTAL_URL` env var. Replace `${baseUrl}/quote/${quote.id}?${buildPortalAccessQuery(access)}` with `${portalBase}/${quote.id}` using external portal URL. No portal access query params needed.

The external portal uses `/{token}` routes directly, NOT `/quote/{id}`.
Default: `https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com`
activeForm: Fixing portal URL generation in API files
